summary:
This course consists of three parts: Preparatory sessions, short-term study abroad and post assessment. During the preparatory session, students will prepare for study abroad program by themselves with the support of the instructors. Students will be assessed on their language proficiency at the culmination of the course.
Subsequently, students will participate in an intensive language course in a language school for 2-5 weeks. Currently, possible destinations are U.K., Canada, U.S.A., Australia, Malaysia and the Philippines. If student would like to study in the country not listed here or would like to learn the language other than English, such as French, Spanish, Chinese or Korean, it could be considered (Please consult the instructors beforehand).
After finishing their study abroad program, students will be required to do post assessment test, presentation about their experience abroad in English and submit the final report.
このコースは、準備セッション、短期留学、事後評価の3つのパートで構成されています。準備セッションでは、講師のサポートを受けながら、学生自身が留学プログラムの準備を行います。コースの最終段階で、学生の語学力を評価します。
その後、語学学校にて2～5週間の集中語学研修に参加します。現在、留学先として、イギリス、カナダ、アメリカ、オーストラリア、マレーシア、フィリピンが挙げられます。ここに挙げられていない国への留学を希望する場合や、英語以外の言語（フランス語、スペイン語、中国語、韓国語など）を学びたい場合は、個別に検討が可能です（事前に講師とご相談ください）。
留学プログラム終了後には、事後評価テスト、留学経験についての英語でのプレゼンテーション、最終レポートの提出が求められます。
aims:
To facilitate study abroad for those students who cannot commit to longer periods abroad, or who want to experience study abroad as a prelude to studying on exchange at a KU partner university. The objectives are are for students to develop personally, and in terms of second language proficiency and intercultural competency.
長期留学が難しい学生や、KU提携大学への交換留学の前段階として留学を経験したい学生のために、留学を促進する。その目的は、学生が人間的に成長し、第二外国語能力と異文化間コンピテンシーを身につけることである。
goals: Students will develop personal skills through planning and participating in an international mobility experience
Students will develop intercultural communication skills through an international mobility experience
Students will develop intercultural communication skills through an international mobility experience
Students will improve their English proficiency through study at a partner school

plan.text: Introduction to the course, course objectives and assessment processes

prereq: Student will need to have basic English communication skills that will allow them to prepare for and participate in study abroad by themselves.
prep: Student will be expected to do class preparation at home.

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
Students are required to take ALL the pre- and post assessments, including the Self-Assessment, EF Set Test, and interview. Participants who do not complete these required assessments will not receive credit, unless there are mitigating circumstances.
受講生は、自己評価、EFセットテスト、面接を含む、すべての事前・事後評価を受ける必要があります。これらの必須評価を完了しない参加者は、緩和された事情がない限り、単位を取得することはできません。

教員の実務経験との関連
Both instructors have extensive experience of traveling, studying and working abroad, experiences which will enable them to provide informed guidance to participating students.
両講師とも、海外渡航、留学、就労の経験が豊富で、参加学生に十分な情報を提供できる。

Dealing with the pragmatics such as flight reservations, passport applications, course reservations, etc.
Communication strategies that can be used when negotiating intercultural communicative encounters
